name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ Crypto Watchlist bot

Track crypto prices and get alerts when they hit your targets.

How it works:
• Tap ⏱ Price to see current prices
• Tap 📋 My watchlist to manage tracked coins
• Tap ➕ Add coin to start tracking a new one
• Tap ⚙️ Settings to configure alerts and quiet hours

Commands:
/start — Open the main menu
/help — Show this message
/add BTC — Quick-add a coin
/remove BTC — Quick-remove a coin
/list — View your watchlist
/price — Check current prices

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
